log.context:
No build step needed — the plugin runs TypeScript directly via Bun.

Here is a summary of the changes made to `/mnt/data/discord-plugin/voice-receive.ts`:

**4 logging points added, all prefixed with `[vc-debug]`:**

1. **`onSpeakingStart`** (line ~467): Logs when a user starts speaking, including whether they were already subscribed (skipped) or newly subscribed. Also logs the resolved username once available.

2. **`flushBuffer` entry** (line ~428): Logs userId, username, chunk count, total by...(truncated)
